ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for and with Barbara de Vries (Petitioner).

The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order). Mr. Siracusa raised the of issue of reducing the Attorney's fees by $700.00, the issue of payment of interest to Fleming (language to be added to the order) and provided a revised order to reflect said reduction.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. (Not Reported)
